## Tags
left, counter-clockwise, rotate, image, 90, 45, degrees, °

## Categories
layout, design, photography, tools, arrows

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/rotate-ccw-square)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::RotateCcwSquare;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        RotateCcwSquare { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
